comment.body:
risk levels statistics ("make or break" trend levels)

hold after breakout upper band = 62.9%
in case of lower band = 45.2% 
OHLC

daily trend:
breaking upper level = 95% up/close ratio, avg return +0.64%
breaking lower level up/close ratio = 11%
avg OC return = -0.88%

Next day follow-through (Close to Close):
Upper band
- if holds = 66% up next day, +0.29% avg return
- if rejects = 33% down next day,  -0.11% avg return

Lower band:
- if holds = +0.42%  avg return (bounce)
- if fails = avg -0.14% next day

the follow-thru is asymmetric: upward risk level performs very well, while lower risk level is a contrarian level
based on OHLC!
